div.h1: Memory Pool vs Linux Slab Allocator

div.p: You built what the Linux kernel uses. Your pool allocator uses the same fundamental techniques as kmalloc:

ul.li: Intrusive free list → No external metadata
Memory poisoning → Use-after-free detection The kernel just adds scale optimizations:

text.tspan: // Poison on free, check on alloc
// Poison on free, check on alloc
// Each CPU has its own freelist
// Each CPU has its own freelist
